component.name: GNOME Power Toys
component.summary: A productivity tool suite for GNOME

description.p: GNOME Power Toys bundles the following utilities:

Each tool appears as its own launcher. The Super+V hotkey for gnome-clips, and the zone-editing hotkey for gnome-zones, are registered by companion GNOME Shell extensions. Shell extensions cannot live inside a Flatpak sandbox; install them with 'apt install gnome-power-toys-extensions' on Debian/Ubuntu, or copy them from the 'gnome-power-toys/extensions/' resource directory inside this Flatpak into '~/.local/share/gnome-shell/extensions/'.
